name: Nemotron 3.5 ASR — Batch (no biasing) on Gold-92
short_description: Per-clip STT predictions from NVIDIA Nemotron 3.5 ASR in batch mode (no word boosting) on all 93 gold-92 benchmark clips.
model_description: NVIDIA Nemotron 3.5 ASR (FastConformer-CTC), NeMo/Riva NIM, GPU inference, batch mode, no vocabulary biasing

files.description: Per-clip STT predictions on all 93 gold-92 benchmark clips. Each line: clip_id, hypothesis, latency_seconds.
